matches.x: “Without the Holy Ghost there can be no revelation, and without revelation there can be no priesthood, for the priesthood is the authority to speak for God. Having discussed the various orders of the priesthood, the Prophet said: ‘The Holy Ghost is God’s messenger to administer in all those priesthoods’ (Teachings, p. 323). Thus we find Moroni saying, ‘And after this manner did they ordain…

60. Every Elder, Priest, Teacher, or Deacon is to be ordained
 according to the gifts and callings of God unto him; and he is to
 be ordained by the power of the Holy Ghost, which is in the one who
 ordains him.

60 Every elder, priest, teacher, or deacon is to be ordained according to the gifts and callings of God unto him; and he is to be ordained by the power of the Holy Ghost, which is in the one who ordains him.
